titleStmt.title: SII 41.27: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 27. (A.R. No. 26 of 1905.) Aragaṇḍanallūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the Aḻagiya-Poṉṉi-Ammaṉ temple.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Mallikārjuna, Śaka 1378, Dhātu, Kārttigai 25, Hasta = 1456 A.D. November, 22, Monday.

summary.p: This records the sale of the village of Perichchāḷinallūr on the north bank of Peṇṇai as tirunāmattukkāṇi to god Opporuvarum-illāda-nayiṉār of Tiruvaṟaiyaṇinallūr in Uḻai(ḍai)kkāḍu-nāḍu, a subdivision of Koṟukkai-kūṟṟam in Jananātha vaḷanāḍu alias Malāḍu, for 200 paṇam by Āviyūr Manaṟppaṅgiḻār Gāṅgaiyar and some other persons. The village is stated to be their kāṇi-āṭchi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastusvastiśrī . śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ Aṟiya Irāyavipāṭaṉ mūvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ
catucamuttiṟātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa tevarāya makārāyar kumārar mallikāṟccuṉa Irāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakātta
m 1000 3 100 7 10 8 Itaṉ meṟ cellāniṉṟa tātu caṅvaccarattu kāttikai mātam 2 10 5 tiyati Attattu nāḷ mallāṭāṉa ceṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu koṟuk
kai kūṟṟattup peṇṇai vaṭakarai Uḻaikkāṭṭu nāṭṭu tiruvaṟaiyaṇi nallur nayiṉār Oppu Oruvarum Illāta nayiṉār Āticaṇṭecura nayiṉāṟku Āviū
r maṇaṟppāṅkiḻān kāṅkaiyar Uḷḷiṭṭār neṟkkuṉṟam tiruvaṇṇāmalai paṭṭar Uḷḷiṭṭār capaiyār viracoḻa nallūr kaḷappāḷar Uḷḷiṭṭārōm Eṅkaḷ kāṇi
Āṭcciyāṉa peṇṇai vaṭakarai periccānallūr nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattam paṟai paṟaitiṭar periya Eri ciṟṟeri Ental Ental
paṟṟu cakalamum Uṭppaṭat tirunāmattukkāṇi vilai Āka niṉṟaiyam paṇṇip paṟṟikkoṇṭa paṇam 2 100ippaṇam Iruṉūṟume vilaiyāvatu Ākavum Ituve poruḷ mā
vaṟuti poruḷ celavolai Āvatu Ākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvuṟuti poruḷ celavolai kāṭṭu Ēṟṟu Eṉṟu collak kaṭavatu Allavākavum Inta peru
ccāḷi nallūṟkku Orukalaṉum Illai kalaṉuḷavāyt toṟṟup paṭil nāṅkaḷe kalaṉ tavirntu kuṭukkak kaṭavomāmavum Ippaṭikku Orukālavatu Iru kālavatu vilai
kkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷuṟakkaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku tirunāmattu kāṇi Āka viṟṟukkuṭutta perucāḷi nallūṟkku vilaiyāṉa paṇa
m Iruṉūṟum paṟṟikkoṇṭavakai Āviūrkāṅkaiyar Uḷḷiṭṭār paṟṟik koṇṭa Orumā5 10neṟkuṉṟam tiruvaṇṇāmalai paṭṭar Uḷḷiṭṭārum capai yārum paṟṟik koṇṭa
paṇam100viracoḻa nallūr kaḷappāḷar Uḷḷiṭṭār paṟṟikkoṇṭa paṇam5 10āka paṇam Iruṉūṟum Inta vakaiyile paṟṟikkoṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇi vilaiyāka paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivai karuṇākarapaṭṭar Eḻuttu
Ivai kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaṇṇāmalaipaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷar Eḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
